global.description: The ad features a modern design with a prominent logo and clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting the new season of StarVault with a clear invitation to watch.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo featuring the text 'StarVault' in a prominent position at the top.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A graphic representation of abstract shapes, including a circle and a square, in a light blue background.

elements.label: small circles
elements.description: Three small circles arranged horizontally, adding a decorative touch to the design.

elements.label: small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle positioned below the circles, contributing to the abstract design.

elements.label: small square
elements.description: A small square located near the bottom of the abstract shapes, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: season announcement
elements.description: Text that reads 'A new season drops Cancel anytime' in a bold, clear font, centrally positioned.
elements.text_content: A new season drops Cancel anytime

elements.label: main title
elements.description: The headline 'StarVault' in a large, eye-catching font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A button labeled 'Watch now' at the bottom, designed to encourage user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by abstract shapes, body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: A new season drops Cancel anytime, StarVault, Watch now
